normalization: UTF-8 input, Unicode NFC, LF line endings, BOM removal, boundary trim only
notes: Public corpus salt is deterministic data binding, not secret material.
The Tanzil snapshot is retained as a raw downloaded file and used with documented normalization only for deterministic hashing experiments.
For publication, cite upstream licenses and retrieval URLs rather than claiming ownership of corpus text.

sources.termsSummary: Project Gutenberg works may generally be reused under the Project Gutenberg License; copyright status varies by jurisdiction.
World English Bible is described by its publisher as public domain; this snapshot is the Project Gutenberg distribution.
Tanzil permits verbatim copying/distribution of its Quran text with source attribution and link; changing the text is not allowed.
